text_original: Fun and realism and gives you a break.
text_zh: 兼具趣味与真实感，还能让你放松一下。
reply_original: Thank you so much! We are thrilled to hear that Fantasia brings you fun, realism, and a much-needed break from daily life. Creating a relaxing and immersive space for you is exactly what we aim for. We will keep working hard to make your experience even better. Enjoy your time with the characters!
reply_zh: 非常感谢！听到 Fantasia 为您带来乐趣、真实感以及日常生活中难得的放松，我们感到无比高兴。为您打造一个轻松且身临其境的空间正是我们的目标。我们会继续努力，让您的体验变得更好。祝您与角色们度过愉快的时光！
